styles.name: Punk Rock

styles.info: Schneller direkter Punkrock-Umbau mit einfachen kraftvollen Patterns

styles.name: R&B
styles.instruments: electric piano, smooth bass, soft drums, warm pad, muted guitar, vocal-like lead
styles.info: Sanfter R&B-orientierter Stil mit warmen Akkorden, geschmeidigem Bass und reduzierten melodischen Hooks.

styles.name: Ragga
styles.instruments: digital reggae bass, dancehall drums, organ stab, brass hit, vocal chop, dub echo
styles.info: Digital reggae/dancehall-adjacent sound with sparse offbeat rhythm and dub-like echoes.

styles.name: Rare Groove
styles.instruments: funk bass, clavinet, brass stab, soul strings, tight drums, wah guitar
styles.info: Funky crate-digging style with syncopated bass, soul chords and vintage groove color.

styles.name: Rave
styles.instruments: hoover synth, rave stab, piano hit, four-on-floor kick, break fill, siren fx
styles.info: Frühe Rave-Energie mit Hoovers, Piano-Hits und direkter Hands-in-the-Air-Bewegung.

styles.name: Reggae
styles.instruments: organ bubble, offbeat guitar, deep bass, rimshot drums, brass stab, dub delay
styles.info: Reggae-Groove mit Offbeat-Akkorden, tiefer Basslinie und entspannter Rhythmik

styles.name: Reggaeton
styles.instruments: dembow drums, sub bass, latin pluck, brass stab, vocal chop, percussion
styles.info: Reggaeton-/Dembow-Preset mit prägnantem Rhythmus, Subbass und kurzen melodischen Hooks.

styles.name: Retrowave
styles.instruments: poly synth, chorus bass, drum machine, bell synth, pad, electric piano
styles.info: Nostalgischer 80er-Stil, weicher und poppiger als Synthwave

styles.name: Rhythm & Grime
styles.instruments: grime bass, rnb keys, syncopated drums, vocal chop, soft pad, icy lead
styles.info: R&B-Harmonie gemischt mit Grime-Rhythmusdruck und kälteren digitalen Lead-Farben.

styles.name: Rock'n Roll
styles.instruments: upright bass, electric guitar, piano, rock drums, sax lead, hand clap
styles.info: Klassischer Rock’n’Roll-Feel mit Piano-/Gitarren-Hooks und treibendem Backbeat.

styles.name: Rockabilly
styles.instruments: slap bass, twang guitar, shuffle drums, piano, clean lead, hand clap
styles.info: Rockabilly-inspirierter Stil mit Slap-Bass-Feel, twangigen Gitarrenfarben und Swing.

styles.name: Rumba
styles.instruments: nylon guitar, soft percussion, upright bass, flute, warm strings, hand clap
styles.info: Romantic Latin-derived preset with softer groove, guitar-like plucks and warm melody.

styles.name: Salsa
styles.instruments: latin piano montuno, congas, brass section, timbales, electric bass, flute
styles.info: Energetic Latin preset with piano montuno flavor, brass hooks and lively percussion.

styles.name: Samba
styles.instruments: surdo kick, shaker, whistle, nylon guitar, bright piano, brass
styles.info: Brazilian-inspired groove with lively percussion, syncopation and festive brightness.

styles.name: Schranz
styles.instruments: relentless kick, distorted stab, hard techno hat, noise sweep, industrial bass, ride
styles.info: Hart treibender Techno mit gnadenloser Percussion und verzerrtem Industrial-Druck.

styles.name: Shoegaze
styles.instruments: washed guitar pad, fuzzy bass, soft drums, chorus lead, dream pad, noise wash
styles.info: Wall-of-sound dream rock preset with washed textures, soft melody and haze.

styles.name: SID Tune
styles.instruments: commodore lead, pulse bass, arpeggio chord, noise drums, raster fx, chip echo
styles.info: C64-/SID-inspirierter Chip-Sound mit schnellen arpeggierten Akkorden und Pulse-Leads.

styles.name: Simple Piano
styles.instruments: acoustic piano, soft bass, sparse strings, no drums, light bell, room reverb
styles.info: Sehr einfaches Piano-Preset mit wenig Ablenkung, geeignet für klare Melodie-/Akkordableitungen ohne Drum-Groove.

styles.name: Ska
styles.instruments: organ, clean guitar skank, brass section, walking bass, drums, sax lead
styles.info: Offbeat-betonter Ska-Groove mit kurzen Akkordstabs und lockerer Bläsermelodie

styles.name: Soul
styles.instruments: electric piano, organ, warm bass, brass section, soft drums, guitar comp
styles.info: Souliges Preset mit warmen Tasteninstrumenten, Bass-Groove und call-and-response-artigen Hooks.

styles.name: Speed Garage
styles.instruments: speed garage bass, shuffled hats, organ stab, 2-step kick, vocal chop, sub drop
styles.info: Schnellere UK-Garage-Variante mit geswingten Drums, Bassdruck und Organ-Stabs.

styles.name: Spherical Harmonics
styles.instruments: glass pad, sine bell, airy choir, sub drone, soft pluck, shimmer texture
styles.info: Abstraktes Harmonie-Textur-Preset mit räumlichen Pads und glockenartigen Obertönen.

styles.name: Surf Rock
styles.instruments: spring guitar, electric bass, organ, rock drums, tremolo lead, crash cymbal
styles.info: Surf-Rock-Preset mit heller Gitarrenmelodie, treibendem Beat und leicht trashiger Retro-Energie.

styles.name: Symphonic Metal
styles.instruments: distorted guitar, orchestral strings, choir, rock drums, synth bass, lead guitar
styles.info: Metal-Groove mit orchestralen Pads und dramatischem Hook-Fokus

styles.name: Synthpop
styles.instruments: poly synth, drum machine, synth bass, bright lead, pad, electronic tom
styles.info: Songorientierter elektronischer Pop mit klaren Hooks und 80er-Einschlag

styles.name: Synthwave
styles.instruments: analog synth lead, juno pad, gated snare, synth bass, arpeggiator, tom fills
styles.info: 80er Retro-Sound mit warmen Pads, breiter Snare und melodischen Hooks

styles.name: Tango
styles.instruments: accordion, strings, upright bass, piano, hand percussion, violin lead
styles.info: Tango-inspiriertes Preset mit Akkordeon, Streicherstabs und dramatischer rhythmischer Betonung.

styles.name: Tech House
styles.instruments: tight kick, rolling bass, short stab, clap, minimal hat, noise sweep
styles.info: Hybrid aus House-Groove und Techno-Reduktion mit straffer Club-Percussion.

styles.name: Techno
styles.instruments: kick drum, offbeat hat, stab synth, rumble bass, ride, noise sweep
styles.info: Minimaler cluborientierter Sound mit starkem Kick-Fokus

styles.name: Techstep
styles.instruments: dark reese bass, dnb break, metallic stab, tech pad, snare ghost, sub bass
styles.info: Dunkler technischer Drum-and-Bass-Stil mit Reese-Bass und kantigen Breaks.

styles.name: Traditional Panflute
styles.instruments: pan flute, nylon guitar, soft strings, hand percussion, warm bass, bells
styles.info: Folkloristisch-weiche Panflöten-Variante mit natürlicheren Melodiefarben

styles.name: Trance
styles.instruments: supersaw lead, rolling bass, gated pad, kick, snare build, arpeggiator
styles.info: Euphorische melodische Clubmusik mit Builds, Breakdowns und großen Leads

styles.name: Trap
styles.instruments: 808 sub, trap hats, snare roll, brass stab, dark pad, pluck lead
styles.info: Modernes Trap-Pattern-Preset mit 808-Bass, Rolls und sparsamen melodischen Hooks.

styles.name: Trap EDM
styles.instruments: 808 sub, trap hats, snare roll, brass synth, pluck lead, riser
styles.info: Elektronischer Trap mit 808-Bass, schnellen HiHat-Rolls und Drops

styles.name: Trip Hop
styles.instruments: dusty break, sub bass, string pad, electric piano, vinyl noise, vocal chop
styles.info: Dunkler langsamer Beat-Stil mit Hip-Hop-, Jazz- und Film-Noir-Atmosphäre

styles.name: Tropical House
styles.instruments: soft pluck, marimba lead, beach pad, light kick, warm bass, vocal chop
styles.info: Entspannter sonniger House-Stil mit Plucks, Marimba-Farben und weichem Clubpuls.

styles.name: Two Step
styles.instruments: syncopated kick, snare, sub bass, rhodes chord, vocal chop, swing hat
styles.info: Sparse two-step garage groove with displaced kicks, shuffle and airy space.

styles.name: UK Bass
styles.instruments: sub bass, garage drums, grime stab, chopped vocal, dark pad, metallic percussion
styles.info: Bass-heavy UK club style between garage, breaks and darker electronic sub pressure.

styles.name: UK Garage
styles.instruments: 2-step drums, organ bass, chord stab, vocal chop, shuffled hats
styles.info: Shuffle-lastiger Clubsound mit versetzten Kicks und geschnittenen Vocals

styles.name: UKG
styles.instruments: 2-step drums, organ bass, chord stab, vocal chop, shuffled hats, warm pad
styles.info: UK Garage shorthand preset with shuffled drums, chopped hooks and warm club chords.

styles.name: Uplifting Trance
styles.instruments: bright supersaw, choir pad, rolling bass, piano break, snare roll, crash
styles.info: Emotionale Trance-Variante mit hellen Leads, längeren Builds und euphorischer Harmonie.

styles.name: Vaporwave
styles.instruments: slowed sample pad, electric piano, soft drum machine, choir pad, tape fx
styles.info: Verlangsamte nostalgische Ästhetik mit surrealem Lounge- und Mall-Sound

styles.name: Vocal House
styles.instruments: house drums, warm piano, organ bass, vocal chop, string pad, soft lead
styles.info: House-Preset mit Fokus auf vocalartige Hook-Fragmente und warme tragende Akkorde.

styles.name: Waltz
styles.instruments: piano, chamber strings, accordion, soft bass, brush percussion, flute
styles.info: Waltz-inspired preset with a one-two-three accent feel and romantic melodic movement.

styles.name: Western
styles.instruments: clean guitar, harmonica, upright bass, brushed drums, whistle lead, strings
styles.info: Western-/Americana-Preset mit Gitarren, Mundharmonika, offenem Raumgefühl und einfachem Groove.
